activate.subtitle: VoctManager Access
activate.description: Complete the final onboarding step to secure your account and enter the operational workspace used for projects, rehearsals, and ensemble coordination.

security.title: Secure onboarding
security.desc: The activation link is bound to your invited account and unlocks the private dashboard only after password setup.

access.title: One-step access
access.desc: After activation you can sign in immediately and review rehearsals, projects, and operational materials.

workspace.title: Professional workspace
workspace.desc: VoctManager centralizes artistic communication, roster data, and production logistics in one panel.

form.subtitle: Password setup
form.title: Finalize your access
form.description: Choose a secure password for the invited account. Once activated, you will use the standard login page to enter the panel.
form.security_desc: Use at least 8 characters. A longer password with mixed letter case, numbers, and symbols is recommended.
form.missing_params: This link is missing activation parameters. Open the latest invitation email and use the full button or URL.

success.subtitle: Activation complete
success.title: Your panel is ready
success.instruction: Proceed to the login page and use your email along with your newly created password to access the panel.

errors.expired_link: This activation link has expired. Request a fresh invitation from the administrator.
errors.invalid_link: This activation link is invalid. Verify the full URL or request a new invitation.
errors.activation_failed: Account activation failed. Verify the link details and try again.
errors.incomplete_link: The activation link is incomplete. Open the latest invitation email and try again.
errors.password_too_short: Use a password with at least 8 characters.
errors.password_mismatch: The password confirmation does not match.
